name: RPlog_An_Interview_with_a_Spy
title: An Interview with a Spy
summary: At the vast Kreldin Estate on martial-law Corellia, the Chiss intelligence operative Cetolum arrives under the pretext of a routine welfare check on Imperial Sovereign Protector Danik Kreldin, while Tesera Kreldin slumbers away in stasis elsewhere on the grounds. Cetolum is secretly investigating a suspected plot to overthrow the Imperial government and begins piecing together that Danik may be operating under the dead-man alias "Alois." Over brandy in Danik's study, the two fence verbally: Cetolum probes about security needs and rumored conspiracies while Danik, fully aware of what the spy is fishing for, plays clueless and insists everything is satisfactory. Danik recognizes Cetolum as a former undercover intelligence agent, adding a layer of mutual wariness to their polite exchange. The interview ends inconclusively, with Cetolum agreeing all is well and departing no closer to open confrontation but with his suspicions confirmed.
